general.name: Zoom Room System Preferences Restrictions
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>D31A705C-C305-46F5-B61E-1A1E081B5E8E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>D31A705C-C305-46F5-B61E-1A1E081B5E8E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Zoom Room System Preferences Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>System Preferences Restrictions:-Software Update-Parental Controls -Profiles-Family Sharing Energy </string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3FA28E0A-ED9C-46A4-BE46-16361D8123DB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3FA28E0A-ED9C-46A4-BE46-16361D8123DB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>B7BBA12B-1F9F-4AC5-92A0-E79EA7F1B44A</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>B7BBA12B-1F9F-4AC5-92A0-E79EA7F1B44A</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>familyControlsEnabled</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CD6AA679-73BE-4060-84A3-AE2F68159FDD</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.coremediaio.support</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CD6AA679-73BE-4060-84A3-AE2F68159FDD</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CoreMediaIO Support</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>Device Access Allowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>EF37AAA9-188A-4BAC-AB68-9FC39B511FE0</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.DiscRecording</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>EF37AAA9-188A-4BAC-AB68-9FC39B511FE0</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>DC27F937-075F-4CC0-8FFA-620D29B04495</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>DC27F937-075F-4CC0-8FFA-620D29B04495</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Store</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>restrict-store-require-admin-to-install</key><false/><key>restrict-store-softwareupdate-only</key><false/><key>restrict-store-disable-app-adoption</key><false/><key>DisableSoftwareUpdateNotifications</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>83182D38-D907-44E5-A502-462137CFD289</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.dashboard</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>83182D38-D907-44E5-A502-462137CFD289</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Dashboard Widget Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>whiteListEnabled</key><false/><key>WhiteList</key><array/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4B3C3BA1-8205-4F7C-80C4-669AA408E504</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.finder</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4B3C3BA1-8205-4F7C-80C4-669AA408E504</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9B9C6BAA-E77D-4701-83F5-280C440E09B4</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>9B9C6BAA-E77D-4701-83F5-280C440E09B4</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F36BB071-0D53-4165-A4C6-5100C8F9513E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F36BB071-0D53-4165-A4C6-5100C8F9513E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><true/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><true/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><true/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><true/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><true/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><true/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><true/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><true/><key>allowWritingTools</key><true/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><true/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrationsSignIn</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><true/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><true/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><true/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><true/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowActivityContinuation</key><true/><key>allowDeprecatedWebKitTLS</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C9DE83C5-FAED-4EE2-AB63-9511E365988B</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C9DE83C5-FAED-4EE2-AB63-9511E365988B</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string><string>com.apple.preferences.configurationprofiles</string><string>com.apple.prefs.backup</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>22263E79-A2E5-4738-8698-6D0D2755A737</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisableUsingiCloudPassword</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>4F9507CE-280D-4689-8080-BB8018B1286E</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systemuiserver</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>4F9507CE-280D-4689-8080-BB8018B1286E</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Media Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array/><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array/><key>blankdvd</key><array/><key>harddisk-external</key><array/><key>blankcd</key><array/><key>dvdram</key><array/></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>CFEC295C-1200-4C81-B2C6-6E68C09E3460</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>CFEC295C-1200-4C81-B2C6-6E68C09E3460</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>1C4F3939-9752-47F2-B82B-D3D189363B6D</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>1C4F3939-9752-47F2-B82B-D3D189363B6D</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.share.AirDrop</string><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.addtoaperture</string><string>com.apple.share.Mail</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.SinaWeibo</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string><string>com.apple.share.LinkedIn.post</string><string>com.apple.share.addtoiphoto</string><string>com.apple.share.Facebook</string><string>com.apple.share.Twitter</string><string>com.apple.share.readlater</string><string>com.apple.share.Video</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>502F7C19-1DF9-4263-A7C0-C285CB9A0CFB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.fileproviderd</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay
